verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.10.0/R5 strict-allowlist Phase 1 Block C run for Philadelphia Phillies @ Kansas City Royals completed the full lifecycle: contest 17 was created and verified; moneyline, spread, and total speculations 39/40/41 were manually seeded and fully filled with zero residual seed exposure; the market maker posted tiny live quotes under strict contest allowlist [17] with seedSpeculations=false; a controlled live spread quote was filled; remaining visible quotes were soft-cancelled or expired; final open commitments were zero; official final score Philadelphia Phillies 1 / Kansas City Royals 15 was verified; contest 17 was scored through R5/CRE; target speculations were settled, winning controlled positions were claimed, and final target active/pending/claimable positions are zero. Caveats: startup own-state stream-health hold cleared before fill, a single own-state-stream projection-ordering error preceded the canonical fill, and live total was skipped after a reference-line mismatch.

capabilities.notes: PHI @ KC contest 17 and specs 39/40/41 passed target identity, allowlist, odds, and runway gates.
SDK/CLI v0.10.0, MM head 6f3ccc1, installed MM SDK v0.9.0, and required ancillary repo heads were verified.
Expected-address checks passed for ospex-stage-maker-b, ospex-stage-maker-a, and ospex-flow-a; public balances were sufficient and allowances were bounded.
Only bounded USDC approvals were used; no unlimited approvals were created.
Candidates --allowlist-only returned quote-ready rows for contest 17 and all three seeded markets; dry run stayed target-scoped with seedSpeculations=false.
Tiny live moneyline and spread commitments posted under strict contest allowlist [17], seedSpeculations=false; total skipped live after a reference-line mismatch.
A controlled taker filled one live MM spread quote for contest 17.
Telemetry captured eventCounts.fill=1 with canonicalFillObserved=true; startup stream-health hold cleared before fill and bad own-state counters stayed zero.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero, target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after postgame, and no orphan MM process remained.
Block C brief did not require a separate scratch cold-start probe; zero-open and no-orphan shutdown proofs were captured.
Official final score was verified and contest 17 scored via R5/CRE using CLI v0.10.0 score --wait.
Moneyline, spread, and total speculations 39/40/41 carried settledAt values after scoring; explicit settle commands returned alreadySettled.
Winning controlled positions were claimed and final target positions are zero.
Tiny manual/live risk plus protocol fees stayed within the Phase 1 Block C low-cap budget.

transactions.purpose: Create contest 17 for Philadelphia Phillies @ Kansas City Royals
Fully match tiny manual moneyline seed for contest 17 speculation 39
Fully match tiny manual spread seed for contest 17 speculation 40
Fully match tiny manual total seed for contest 17 speculation 41
Controlled fill against live MM spread quote on contest 17
Request R5 score for contest 17 after MLB official final
Score transaction produced settled target speculations 39/40/41; explicit settle commands then returned alreadySettled
Claim stage-maker-a winning moneyline position for speculation 39 side lower
Claim stage-maker-a winning total position for speculation 41 side upper
Claim flow-a winning spread position for speculation 40 side lower
